name: 2pk Small Produce Bin Fridge Bin with Lid - Brightroom™: Refrigerator Organizers, Stackable Kitchen Storage
description:
Make sure your fridge stays organized with the help of this 2-Pack of Small Produce Fridge Bins from Brightroom™. Made from a BPA-free material, this set includes two rectangular storage containers, each featuring an open-top design for easy access to the contents and lids with integrated handles. Featuring a clear design to ensure the contents always stay visible, these fridge storage bins come in handy for storing cut fruits or vegetables to maximize the space in your fridge.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
